description_long: This object is a compact, cylindrical bottle with a matte black finish and a robust, hard plastic exterior. The top features a round, slightly raised screw cap with subtle ridges for grip, and the body is adorned with fine, horizontal texturing for additional handling comfort. Several white and silver markings, including branding and technical details, are visible on the side, along with a small red dot and a rectangular switch or button. The overall design is utilitarian and modern, with a seamless transition between the cap and the main body. The bottle appears sturdy and well-sealed, suitable for containing liquids or sensitive contents. No visible signs of damage or wear are present, and the object exudes a professional, high-quality appearance.
description: A compact, matte black cylindrical bottle with a screw cap, fine texturing, and visible branding and markings. The design is robust, modern, and professional.
description_view_0: Front view shows the screw cap, main branding, and a smooth, slightly textured body.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the cylindrical shape and subtle horizontal texturing, with minimal visible markings.
description_view_2: Rear view displays additional branding, technical markings, and a small red dot near the base.
description_view_3: Side view reveals a rectangular switch or button and the '50mm' marking, emphasizing functional details.
attribute_label_or_branding: White 'Canon' logo, '50mm' marking, technical details, and a small red dot; all branding is printed in white or silver on the black body.
